title: 理事長代理の評価アップ

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I watched your training session. It wasn't too bad.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Their forms were good. I would even say they
were beautiful. You're unexpectedly good at
coaching them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Keep it up, and don't get lax. Now, if you'll
excuse me.
